# iproute_link (Data Source)

Read information about a network link.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read link information
data "iproute_link" "eth0" {
  name = "eth0"
}

output "eth0_mtu" {
  value = data.iproute_link.eth0.mtu
}

output "eth0_mac" {
  value = data.iproute_link.eth0.mac_address
}

output "eth0_status" {
  value = data.iproute_link.eth0.oper_status
}

# Read loopback
data "iproute_link" "lo" {
  name = "lo"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Interface name.

### Read-Only

- `admin_status` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `if_index` (Number)
- `mac_address` (String)
- `master` (String)
- `mtu` (Number)
- `oper_status` (String)
- `tx_queue_len` (Number)
- `type` (String)
